text:
Created attachment 182837
Patch to 0.8.2

* Update to lnav 0.8.2
* Add optional dependency on libcurl
* Fix crash on i386
* Add USES=compiler:c++14-lang
* Remove USES=python

Update summary: https://github.com/tstack/lnav/releases/tag/v0.8.2

poudriere testport on 10.3 and 11.0 looks good with and without CURL.
